attic_p: Attic-based Nix binary cache server with multi-tenancy, global deduplication, and S3 backend support. Runs on G41KiTS, serving NixKits package build artifacts.
attic_link: /attic/ → cache statistics & status page
attic_pre2:
# Or use via cachix
cachix use nixkits
attic_note: ※ Replace <key> with the public key generated by running atticd --database /data/attic.db generate-keypair on the server.
